signals.headline: Spot Ethereum ETFs Pull Record April Inflows as ETH/BTC Ratio Hits Three-Month High | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Spot Ethereum ETFs Pull Record April Inflows as ETH/BTC Ratio Hits Three-Month High | YES | HIGH confidence**

Spot Ethereum ETFs have posted their strongest April performance of 2026, with daily inflows between $60 million and $200 million across multiple sessions, led by BlackRock ETHA and Fidelity FETH.[1] The ETH to BTC ratio climbed to 0.0313 on April 15, marking a three-month high, signaling

signals.headline: Policy uncertainty: CLARITY Act markup delayed to May | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Policy uncertainty: CLARITY Act markup delayed to May | YES | MED confidence**

Senate Banking Committee markups on the CLARITY Act have been pushed from April to May due to mounting pressure from banks seeking input on stablecoin yield regulations, potentially extending regulatory uncertainty for the crypto market.[5]
